description: First national-team editorial backlog — wave 1 live nations (England, France, Spain, Brazil, Argentina). Prioritizes World Cup relevance, recognizable stars, and durable NT-linked quiz hints.
selectionRules: Player must appear in nationalTeamLive.json membership for the target nation.
Prefer World Cup / major-tournament pedigree and unmistakable full names in hints.
Skip crowded surnames without club or given-name context (García, Rodrigo, Martínez).
Do not approve players missing from FootyBrain sampleData or TM preview sourceId.
Argentina and France are highest urgency (fewest quiz-ready per linked squad).

nations.rationale: Only two quiz-ready Albiceleste players; national quiz mode needs at least three linked approvals.

candidates.notes: 2022 World Cup winner; Betis playmaker; full name avoids Lo Celso ambiguity.
Villa no. 10; Copa América squad pedigree; distinctive given name.
Marseille centre-back; 2022 World Cup squad; not Leonardo Balerdi.
Marseille partner to Medina; use full name in hints.
Argentina goalkeeper at Palace; full name disambiguates from other Benítez.
Young Strasbourg forward in TM Argentina link set; youth pipeline hint.

nations.rationale: Deep TM link list but many browse-only stars (2018 winners, Euro contenders).

2022 World Cup final substitute; use full hyphenated surname in hints.
